rationale: The citing paper is about goal-gradient effort acceleration and retention in loyalty/reward programs (hazard, Tobit, and logit models of repeated effort), whereas the cited paper is about compromise-effect models in multiattribute product choice (CCM/NCCM/LAM/RAM).
